summary: The CI job failed during the `gen-all` recipe after running `rustfmt`. The `format` sub-recipe invoked `pnpm format`, but `pnpm` is not installed on the runner, causing a command-not-found exit with code 127.
root_cause: The `pnpm` package manager is not available on the runner (`sh: 1: pnpm: not found`), so the `format` recipe (called from `gen-all`) failed with exit code 127.

evidence.reason: The Justfile recipe attempted to run `pnpm format` as part of code generation/verification.
The shell reported that pnpm is not installed on the runner, causing the command to fail.

evidence.quote: error: Recipe `format` failed on line 221 with exit code 127
evidence.reason: The `format` recipe exited with code 127 (command not found) due to the missing pnpm binary.

evidence.quote: error: Recipe `gen-all` failed on line 32 with exit code 127
evidence.reason: The parent `gen-all` recipe also failed because its sub-recipe `format` failed.
GitHub Actions marked the step as failed with exit code 127, confirming the root cause is the missing `pnpm` binary.

suggested_fix: Install `pnpm` on the runner before executing the `gen-all` / `format` recipe, e.g., add a step `npm install -g pnpm` (or use the `pnpm/action-setup` action) prior to running `cargo run -p xtask_codegen --features global_types -- global-types --verify`.

model_info._backfill_note: Pre-Codex-2026-05-14 F2 fix. The Claude shim now persists _model_info from every API call; this row predates that emit so resolved_model and usage are not recoverable. requested_model is set to the shim-level alias (haiku for v1, sonnet for v2) which is what the post-fix shim emits.
